prompt: Create a high-fashion Met Gala 2026 red-carpet editorial photograph of an elegant young woman posing on a grand blue carpeted staircase, viewed from behind in a graceful three-quarter turn with one hand resting at her waist and her head turned slightly over her shoulder. She has dark brown hair styled in a polished romantic updo, a slender pale figure, bare shoulders, and a deliberately soft, indistinct face so the focus stays on the couture. Dress her in exactly 4 main outfit pieces: a strapless silver crystal-embroidered bodice, a long ivory satin center panel trailing down the back, a dramatic deep midnight navy velvet overskirt with voluminous gathered hip draping, and an extended floor-sweeping train covered with ornate silver floral embroidery and beadwork. The gown should feel opulent, sculptural, and museum-worthy, with glittering lace appliqué, botanical motifs, and heavy satin-velvet texture. Set the scene at the Met Gala staircase, with dark teal-blue stairs decorated with small daisy-like flower motifs, dense cream-and-green floral walls on both sides, and a crowd of photographers in black tuxedos behind the subject holding cameras with bright flashes. Use a realistic celebrity paparazzi photo style, shallow depth of field, cinematic flash lighting, natural skin tones, crisp fabric detail, luxurious contrast, vertical 2:3 composition, and the atmosphere of a glamorous fashion gala. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra people in the foreground, distorted anatomy, and cartoon styling.
